feedback.text: Hello, my name is Dmitij Alexsson, i'm from Russia and i know how complicated our relationship with EU is at the moment but i think you guys are doing the right thing and i beg you, please look into Stop Destroying Videogames initiative, it just recently passed required amount of votes from EU citizens to be looked into by EU officials (i'm sorry, i don't exactly know how EU voting works) Its an initiative to prevent video game developers from taking away video games that they have sold to customers. Just recently a number of games have been shutdown, one of them was Anthem which i really liked. Please considering discussing some kind of protection, so that publishers / developers cannot just take away product they have already sold to customers. Thank you for your time.
